title: Replace remaining corelib stubs with Standard implementations

source.subject: fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none

body:
Replace remaining corelib stubs with Standard implementations

## Scope

Finish `compiler/corelib` packages beyond tier-tagged v0.3 slice: Core, System I/O split surfaces, collections/FS/Path parity with platform-spec, and api.json without placeholder stubs.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4)
- **Subject:** fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none
- **Catalog tip:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4) (v0.4 cutoff 2026-05-27)
- **Status:** Backlog

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-corelib`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-corelib-complete`

## Depends on

`compiler-quality-submodule-bump` (In Progress).
